excerpt: The official programme page for MSc in Artificial Intelligence for Science lists Main application period opening on 2025-09-01 and closing on 2026-04-30. Source: https://www.gs.cuhk.edu.hk/admissions/application-deadline 30 April 2026 Applications will be processed on a rolling basis until all places have been filled. Therefore, early applications are strongly encouraged.
